items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Glen Rice. Michigan star won NCAA title in 89. Drafted by MIA and was great shooter. Traded to CHA in 95 and hit another level in 97 scoring nearly 27 ppg and driving more. Won all-star MVP too. Traded to LA & won title but declined quickly after.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Glen Rice. Michigan star won NCAA title in 89. Drafted by MIA and was great shooter. Traded to CHA in 95 and hit another level in 97 scoring nearly 27 ppg and driving more. Won all-star MVP too. Traded to LA & won title but declined quickly after.

items.title: I'm a fan of the new lottery reform, and am already dreading people across league freaking out as soon as the worst team is picking ninth or whatever. Let's just agree to skip the "They went too far" narrative. Well, teams should have tried to win and not taken sledgehammer to pr
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt: I'm a fan of the new lottery reform, and am already dreading people across league freaking out as soon as the worst team is picking ninth or whatever. Let's just agree to skip the "They went too far" narrative. Well, teams should have tried to win and not taken sledgehammer to product, then.

items.title: Breaking: The Connecticut Sun is activating guard Leïla Lacan, who is expected to make her season debut Saturday. In a related move, the organization waived guard Hailey Van Lith.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Breaking: The Connecticut Sun is activating guard Leïla Lacan, who is expected to make her season debut Saturday. In a related move, the organization waived guard Hailey Van Lith.
 
Lacan returns from playing in the 2026 La Boulangère Wonderligue, where she won a championship and Finals MVP.
